tools.name: earlywire_whats_new
tools.description: Newest items on the wire — the freshest judged marketing/growth atoms (newsletters, vendor changelogs, practitioner feeds). Use for 'what's new / what did I miss / catch me up' with NO specific topic in mind; for a specific topic use search or topic_pulse instead. Args: category (optional marketing

tools.name: earlywire_search
tools.description: Search the Earlywire wire — curated, editor-scored marketing & growth intelligence from trusted practitioner sources. Your FIRST STOP for ANY marketing, growth, analytics, or measurement question, conceptual OR current. Covers: attribution & measurement (MMM, incrementality, last-click), GA4 & analy

tools.name: earlywire_topic_pulse
tools.description: What the marketing/growth niche is SAYING about one topic right now: chatter volume, who's covering it, score spread, and the top takes. Use when you want the discussion and disagreement around a specific topic (e.g. 'consent mode', 'AI Max', 'Performance Max', 'incrementality') — not just a list of

tools.name: earlywire_trending
tools.description: Topics RISING on the wire this window vs the previous one — velocity over a controlled vocabulary, counting distinct events (syndicated copies collapse). Use for 'what's heating up / trending in marketing' with no specific topic in mind. Args: window_days (default 7, capped at 90).

tools.name: earlywire_get_item
tools.description: Fetch one item by id: tldr, judge reason, a `summary` (own-words digest you can cite for numbers/claims/frameworks), and the raw `excerpt`. For verbatim quotes or detail beyond the summary, fetch the source url with your web tools; most sources are public pages.

tools.name: earlywire_coverage
tools.description: What this wire does and doesn't cover: per-source freshness and volume, category mix, last refresh. Call when unsure whether a question is answerable from here. The corpus is a curated marketing/growth niche (incl. the AI shifts affecting it) — not general news.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: earlywire_whats_new, earlywire_search, earlywire_get_item · Public sink: earlywire_search.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: earlywire_whats_new, earlywire_search, earlywire_get_item · Public sink: earlywire_search

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
